question: What is Canada's defense spending as a percentage of GDP relative to the NATO 2% target in 2025?

evidence_pool.span_text: Canada is projected to reach 1.4% of GDP on defense in 2025, below the 2% NATO target agreed at the 2014 Wales Summit; the 2024 Defence Policy Update commits to 1.76% by 2029-30.
Our North, Strong and Free defence-policy update sets a path to 1.76% of GDP by FY 2029-30 with a forward investment of $73B over 20 years.

verified_sentences.sentence_text: Canada is projected at 1.4% of GDP on defense in 2025, below the NATO 2% target [#ev:ev_def_001:200-420]; the 2024 policy update commits to 1.76% by FY 2029-30 [#ev:ev_def_002:1100-1320].
